_comment: Contexte pre-calcule par le director. Cycle 20.

key_findings.minigames_events: ALL minigames use pointer* events — already touch-compatible. Only mg_runes.ts and mg_traces.ts use 'click'. T057 scope: add touch-action:none CSS on canvases + migrate runes/traces 'click' to 'pointerdown' for consistency.
key_findings.villages_celtes_cards: 0 biome-tagged villages_celtes cards exist. The 20 from T015 cycle5 lack biome field. Batch2 must include biome:'villages_celtes'.
key_findings.vercel_json: vercel.json has no headers section. Add Cache-Control for /data/cards.json.

constraints_villages_batch2.faction_options_mix: korrigans >= 8/20 options, niamh >= 4/20 options, druides total <= 3 cards
constraints_villages_batch2.themes: fetes villageoises, forge, marche, puits du village, assemblée des anciens, festival des korrigans, fete des moissons, druide du village, barde itinerant

T056_context.pattern: Add playSound(type: string) function at bottom of main.ts. Dispatches window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('merlin_sfx', {detail:{type}})).

wiring_points.win: After minigame score > 65 branch in switch
wiring_points.unlock: After ogham unlock toast in ogham progression code

T057_context.finding: All canvas minigames already use pointer* events (touch-native). Only mg_runes.ts and mg_traces.ts use 'click' event.
T057_context.action: 1) In MinigameBase.ts or each canvas setup: add canvas.style.touchAction = 'none'. 2) In mg_runes.ts + mg_traces.ts: add pointerdown listener alongside/instead of click for touch-friendliness.
T057_context.css_alternative: Add touch-action: none to canvas in index.html or vite-injected style

perf_cache_context.add: headers array: path /data/cards.json -> Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400, stale-while-revalidate=3600
